gdalraster.windows 0.2.0
  • Reference
    • Guides
    • Using gdalraster.windows on Windows
    • Troubleshooting
    • Internals
    • GDAL Runtime Architecture on Windows
  • Changelog

Changelog

Source: CHANGELOG.md

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. The format is based on Keep a Changelog and this project adheres to Semantic Versioning.

[Unreleased]

DevOps

  • build: Scope CI to GDAL bundle only; always produce durable artifacts (c64aaae) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • pkgdown: Add GitHub Actions workflow to build and deploy pkgdown site (3922d9e) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • workflows: Add R CMD CHECK workflow and update README badges (b023b98) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • changelog: Run changelog workflow on pushes/PRs and bump actions versions (bbb711a) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Add Windows R CMD CHECK workflow (44a366c) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Documentation

  • Promote technical docs to published vignettes; fix #2 and #5 code paths (07b27f5) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Address review feedback - clarify fallback_zip default, namespace-qualify troubleshooting calls (a69ed0f) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Refresh all docs for embedded-python runtime layer and offline install (c54717e) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • readme: Fix R CMD CHECK badge link and add pkgdown badge (10fee19) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Rewrite README with comprehensive Windows GDAL runtime guide (e9de2e9) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Add in-depth Windows GDAL runtime guides and update package docs (0fac782) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Features

  • Bundle pure-python osgeo_utils and expose via PYTHONPATH at runtime activation (3cba16f) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • startup: Add runtime bootstrap and startup sitrep, streamline verification (77048b3) - (Jimmy Briggs)
    • BREAKING CHANGE: option and API changes:
  • Option renamed: gdalraster.windows.auto_activate → gdalraster.windows.auto_bootstrap
  • verify_gdalraster_runtime signature/behavior changed: now returns TRUE/FALSE (not a list) and accepts a new quiet argument; callers relying on the old return structure must be updated.
  • Startup sitrep display is now controlled by options(gdalraster.windows.startup.sitrep).
  • startup: Add .Rprofile hook to preload GDAL DLL and manage gdalraster lib (5a55159) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • gdal: Add local and fallback zip support to install_gdal_runtime (a4c1445) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Testing

  • Add Windows clean-room e2e tests, helpers, and README docs (a0378d0) - (Jimmy Briggs)

gdal-v3.13.0- (2026-05-23)

Bug Fixes

  • gdalraster: Add –no-test-load to source install to avoid test-load failures (326f2c2) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • gdalraster: Make source install more robust and improve error reporting (0202c66) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • ci: Run R CMD INSTALL via Rscript system2 (116f093) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • ci: Make dependency leak gate bundle-aware (35c4f0d) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • ci: Use valid MSYS2 libspatialite package name (b0aa88b) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • ci: Harden ntldd dependency parsing in collect step (693ca2d) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • ci: Harden GDAL workflow for portable runtime validation (c24abe7) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • ci: Align GDAL workflow with validated dependency closure (db5b717) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Add missing MSYS2 deps (PROJ, libxml2, xerces-c, deflate, tiff, geotiff, curl, sqlite, zlib) and fix hardcoded R.exe paths (ec26905) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Update GDAL build scripts and paths (2280f93) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Configuration

  • .cursor: Add MCP server config and scaffold cursor directories (84318da) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Documentation

  • Refresh maintainer docs, AGENTS guidance, and README (e7beb45) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Add curated maintainer docs and overhaul top-level README (bbd3a74) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • changelog: Add GitHub Action to generate and push CHANGELOG.md (3da74a8) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Features

  • gdal: Add local and fallback zip support to install_gdal_runtime (74a069f) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • gdalraster: Add install/load helpers and dynamic GDAL DLL discovery (de9e869) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • docs: Add Rd man pages and update DESCRIPTION & NAMESPACE (46376e6) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Add Windows GDAL runtime wrapper package and CI to build GDAL and R binaries (373663f) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Changelog generated by git-cliff. ***

On this page

Developed by Jimmy Briggs.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
